results.rendered_html:
likṣā, likhyā
1 A nit, the egg of a louse.
2 A very minute measure of weight (said to be equal to 4 or
8 trasarenus); jālāṃtaragate bhānau yaccāṇu dṛśyate rajaḥ . taiścaturbhirbhavellikṣā; or trasareṇavoṣṭau vijñeyā likṣaikā parimāṇataḥ  Ms. 8. 133 ; see  Y. 1. 362  also.
